mapper.select: SELECT m.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_mt.code_label AS menu_type_cd_nm FROM sy_menu m LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = m.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_mt ON cd_mt.code_grp = 'MENU_TYPE' AND cd_mt.code_value = m.menu_type_cd WHERE m.menu_id = #{id}

SELECT m.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_mt.code_label AS menu_type_cd_nm FROM sy_menu m LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = m.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_mt ON cd_mt.code_grp = 'MENU_TYPE' AND cd_mt.code_value = m.menu_type_cd
ORDER BY m.menu_id ASC ORDER BY m.menu_id DESC ORDER BY m.menu_nm ASC ORDER BY m.menu_nm DESC ORDER BY m.reg_date ASC ORDER BY m.reg_date DESC ORDER BY m.reg_date DESC
